content_extractability.method: Content extraction completeness and cleanliness analysis

extraction_metrics.extracted_preview: Getting Started with Repositories This beginner-friendly guide will help you get the basic skills you need to create and manage your repository on the Hub. Each section builds on the previous one, so feel free to choose where to start! Requirements This document shows how to handle repositories thro...

structured_data.method: Structured data quality and completeness validation
structured_data.score_calculation: Type appropriateness (20) + Field completeness (30) + Multiple formats (20) + Schema validation (30)

violations.help: <html> element must have a lang attribute

any.message: The <html> element does not have a lang attribute

Fix any of the following:
  The <html> element does not have a lang attribute

violations.description: Ensures every form element has a label

any.message: aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Form element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
Form element does not have an explicit <label>
Element has no title attribute or the title attribute is empty

nodes.html:
<input autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false" type="text" class="w-full dark:bg-gray-950 pl-8
			form-input-alt h-9 pr-3 focus:shadow-xl " name="" placeholder="Search models, datasets, users...">

violations.description: Ensures <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
violations.help: Zooming and scaling must not be disabled

any.message: user-scalable=no on <meta> tag disables zooming on mobile devices

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  user-scalable=no on <meta> tag disables zooming on mobile devices

dom_navigability.score_calculation: Based on violation severity and frequency

metadata_completeness.method: Metadata field presence and quality check
metadata_completeness.score_calculation: Sum of field scores (title 15, description 15, author 15, date 15, topic 15, language 10, canonical 15)

http_compliance.score_calculation: HTML reachability (15) + Redirect efficiency (25) + Robots/crawl permissions (20) + Cache headers (20) + Agent content hints (20)

agent_content_hints.rationale: PRD F2.2/F2.3: retrieval-lift evidence deferred to Phase 6

caveats: Single corpus, single grader architecture, single run.
Four pillars carry zero headline weight in v2; still reported as diagnostics.
Profile-specific weights collapse to the same 2-pillar composite pending corpus-003.

Cross-judge accuracy variance: per-judge corpus-002 means span 0.591-0.698 across Llama-3.3-70B, GPT-4o, and DeepSeek-V3.2 (pooled kappa 0.706-0.817). The v2 composite-vs-accuracy Pearson r ranges from +0.440 to +0.618 across judges (all above the +0.35 ship gate). Report majority-vote CI [0.567, 0.688] or per-judge union CI [0.530, 0.758] when comparing across studies.
